model_specification_line: results = smf.wls('full_time ~ treatment + age + I(age**2) + LFPR + UNEMP + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: age between 18 and 35 with non-missing birthyr, yrimmig, empstat, uhrswork, and perwt > 0
yrimmig between 1990 and 2007 so the cohort arrived before the June 2007 cutoff
0 <= age_at_arrival <= 40 to stay within plausible arrival ages for this adult cohort
